---
title: "EDA-Regression-only"
author: "Group 8"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

### Initial data pull/clean
```{r}
#read the data from the fed website
library(readr)
url <- "https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=UNRATENSA"
unratensa_data <- read_csv(url)

#convert to time series
unratensa_ts <- ts(unratensa_data$UNRATENSA, start = c(1948, 1), frequency = 12)

#interpolate the NA values
library(forecast)
unratensa_ts_interp <- na.interp(unratensa_ts)

#summary stats
summary(unratensa_ts_interp)
sd(unratensa_ts_interp)
```

### smoothing and stl
```{r}
#full data set and smoothing
plot(unratensa_ts_interp, ylab="Unemployment Rate (NSA)", xlab = "time",
     col = "black", main = "Monthly Unemployment Rate, USA, Not Seasonally Adjusted")
lines(lowess(unratensa_ts_interp, f=0.01), lwd=2, col="red")

#stl analysis
unratensa_stl <- stl(unratensa_ts_interp, s.window = "periodic")
plot(unratensa_stl)

season <- unratensa_stl$time.series[,1]
trend <- unratensa_stl$time.series[,2]
res <- unratensa_stl$time.series[,3]

acf(res, main = "ACF(residuals) Unrate data")
```

### Residual AR fit model
```{r}
#get the order of the AR fit using Yule-Walker
fit_ar <- ar.yw(res, order.max = NULL)
fit_ar

#lower order AR
res_clean <- na.omit(as.numeric(res))

# Fit lower-order AR models
ar1 <- arima(res_clean, order = c(1, 0, 0), include.mean = TRUE)
ar2 <- arima(res_clean, order = c(2, 0, 0), include.mean = TRUE)
ar3 <- arima(res_clean, order = c(3, 0, 0), include.mean = TRUE)
ar4 <- arima(res_clean, order = c(4, 0, 0), include.mean = TRUE)
ar5 <- arima(res_clean, order = c(5, 0, 0), include.mean = TRUE)

# Compare lower-order models using AIC
AIC(ar1, ar2, ar3, ar4, ar5)

# Check selected AR(5) residuals
acf(residuals(ar5), main = "ACF of AR(5) Residuals")
```

### Trend model
```{r}
time <- 1:length(trend)
dat.trend <- data.frame(trend = trend, time = time)

# polynomial fits
fit_poly3 <- lm(trend ~ time + I(time^2) + I(time^3), data = dat.trend)

fit_poly5 <- lm(trend ~ time + I(time^2) + I(time^3) + 
                  I(time^4) + I(time^5), data = dat.trend)

fit_poly8 <- lm(trend ~ time + I(time^2) + I(time^3) + 
                  I(time^4) + I(time^5) + I(time^6) + 
                  I(time^7) + I(time^8), data = dat.trend)

# summaries
summary(fit_poly3)
summary(fit_poly5)
summary(fit_poly8)

# compare polynomial degrees
plot(time, trend, pch=".", main="Trend with Different Polynomial fits")

lines(time, fitted(fit_poly3), col="blue", lwd=2)
lines(time, fitted(fit_poly5), col="orange", lwd=2)
lines(time, fitted(fit_poly8), col="green", lwd=2)

legend("topleft",
       legend=c("Trend", "poly 3", "poly 5", "poly 8"),
       col=c("black", "blue", "orange", "green"),
       lwd=2)

# AIC/BIC selection criteria
AIC(fit_poly3, fit_poly5, fit_poly8)
BIC(fit_poly3, fit_poly5, fit_poly8)
```

### Seasonal model
```{r}
time <- 1:length(season)

# month index 1-12 repeating
month <- cycle(unratensa_ts_interp)

dat.season <- data.frame(
  season = as.numeric(season),
  time = time,
  month = as.numeric(month)
)

# trig fit, 1 harmonic
fit_season1 <- lm(season ~ 
                    cos(2*pi*month/12) + sin(2*pi*month/12),
                  data = dat.season)

# trig fit, 3 harmonics
fit_season2 <- lm(season ~ 
                    cos(2*pi*month/12) + sin(2*pi*month/12) +
                    cos(4*pi*month/12) + sin(4*pi*month/12) +
                    cos(6*pi*month/12) + sin(6*pi*month/12),
                  data = dat.season)

# check model summaries
summary(fit_season1)
summary(fit_season2)

# AIC/BIC comparison
AIC(fit_season1, fit_season2)
BIC(fit_season1, fit_season2)

# fitted seasonal values
season_fit1 <- fitted(fit_season1)
season_fit2 <- fitted(fit_season2)

# full plot
plot(time, season, pch=".", col="black",
     main="Seasonal Component with Trig Fits",
     xlab="Time", ylab="Seasonal Component")

lines(time, season_fit1, col="red", lwd=2)
lines(time, season_fit2, col="blue", lwd=2)

legend("topright",
       legend=c("STL Seasonal Component", "1 Harmonic", "3 Harmonics"),
       col=c("black", "red", "blue"),
       lwd=2)
```

### Combined Models
```{r}
#trend comp
tr_poly3 <- fitted(fit_poly3)
tr_poly5 <- fitted(fit_poly5)
tr_poly8 <- fitted(fit_poly8)

#seasonal comp, monthly cycle, cycle() fixed to a 1-12 cycle
month <- cycle(unratensa_ts_interp)

# rebuild seasonal fits
coef_s1 <- coef(fit_season1)
coef_s2 <- coef(fit_season2)

ss1 <- coef_s1[1] +
       coef_s1[2]*cos(2*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s1[3]*sin(2*pi*month/12)

ss2 <- coef_s2[1] +
       coef_s2[2]*cos(2*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s2[3]*sin(2*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s2[4]*cos(4*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s2[5]*sin(4*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s2[6]*cos(6*pi*month/12) +
       coef_s2[7]*sin(6*pi*month/12)

#combined regression-only models
yhat1 <- tr_poly3 + ss1                 # simple
yhat2 <- tr_poly5 + ss2                 # balanced
yhat3 <- tr_poly8 + ss2                 # flexible / overfit comparison

# convert fitted values to time series
yhat1_ts <- ts(yhat1, start=start(unratensa_ts_interp), frequency=12)
yhat2_ts <- ts(yhat2, start=start(unratensa_ts_interp), frequency=12)
yhat3_ts <- ts(yhat3, start=start(unratensa_ts_interp), frequency=12)

# final residuals for regression-only models
final_resid1 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat1_ts
final_resid2 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat2_ts
final_resid3 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat3_ts

# Function to add AR(5) residual errors
add_ar5_errors <- function(yhat_ts, actual_ts) {
  resid <- actual_ts - yhat_ts
  
  ar5_fit <- arima(as.numeric(resid),
                   order = c(5, 0, 0),
                   include.mean = TRUE)
  
  ar5_resid <- residuals(ar5_fit)
  ar5_component <- as.numeric(resid) - ar5_resid
  
  yhat_ar5 <- as.numeric(yhat_ts) + ar5_component
  
  return(ts(yhat_ar5,
            start = start(actual_ts),
            frequency = frequency(actual_ts)))
}

# AR(5)-adjusted models
yhat1_ar5_ts <- add_ar5_errors(yhat1_ts, unratensa_ts_interp)
yhat2_ar5_ts <- add_ar5_errors(yhat2_ts, unratensa_ts_interp)
yhat3_ar5_ts <- add_ar5_errors(yhat3_ts, unratensa_ts_interp)

# final residuals for AR(5)-adjusted models
final_resid1_ar5 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat1_ar5_ts
final_resid2_ar5 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat2_ar5_ts
final_resid3_ar5 <- unratensa_ts_interp - yhat3_ar5_ts
```

### Model comparison plots
```{r}
#Regression-only models
plot(unratensa_ts_interp, col="black",
     main="Model Comparison: Regression-Only Models",
     ylab="Unemployment Rate")

lines(yhat1_ts, col="red")
lines(yhat2_ts, col="blue")
lines(yhat3_ts, col="green")

legend("topleft",
       legend=c("Actual",
                "Model 1: Poly3 + 1 Harmonic",
                "Model 2: Poly5 + 3 Harmonics",
                "Model 3: Poly8 + 3 Harmonics"),
       col=c("black", "red", "blue", "green"),
       lwd=2)

#AR(5)-adjusted models
plot(unratensa_ts_interp, col="black",
     main="Model Comparison: Regression + AR(5) Errors",
     ylab="Unemployment Rate")

lines(yhat1_ar5_ts, col="red")
lines(yhat2_ar5_ts, col="blue")
lines(yhat3_ar5_ts, col="green")

legend("topleft",
       legend=c("Actual",
                "Model 1 + AR(5)",
                "Model 2 + AR(5)",
                "Model 3 + AR(5)"),
       col=c("black", "red", "blue", "green"),
       lwd=2)
```

### Residual diagnostics
```{r}
# ACF comparisons for selected balanced model
acf(final_resid2, main="ACF of Final Residuals: Model 2")
acf(final_resid2_ar5, main="ACF: Model 2 + AR(5)")

# Ljung-Box residual checks
Box.test(final_resid1, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")
Box.test(final_resid2, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")
Box.test(final_resid3, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")

Box.test(final_resid1_ar5, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")
Box.test(final_resid2_ar5, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")
Box.test(final_resid3_ar5, lag=12, type="Ljung-Box")
```
